nasb.text: Now the sons of Jerahmeel the firstborn of Hezron were Ram the firstborn, then Bunah, Oren, Ozem and Ahijah.

esv.text: The sons of Jerahmeel, the firstborn of Hezron: Ram, his firstborn, Bunah, Oren, Ozem, and Ahijah.

cnv.text: 希斯崙的長子耶拉篾的兒子是長子蘭、布拿、阿連、阿鮮和亞希雅。

ccb.text: 希斯仑的长子耶拉篾生了长子兰，又生了布拿、阿连、阿鲜、亚希雅。
